name: Chiles Rellenos Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Whole green chili peppers (7 oz.)
3 cups Shredded Sharp Cheddar cheese (approx. 12 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the chili peppers lengthwise and remove seeds and pith. Place the chilies in a single layer in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
2. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese, green onions, and 1-1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese over the chilies.
3. In a bowl, beat together eggs, milk, flour, and salt until smooth.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the chilies and cheese.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the custard comes out clean.
6. Meanwhile, mix the remaining salsa with the other 1-1/2 cups mozzarella cheese.
7. Sprinkle this mixture over the casserole and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
8. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Per Serving: 33 grams protein, 22 grams carbohydrate, 271 milligrams cholesterol, 490 calories.
